title: helianthemum cinereum f. stipulatum
intro: Helianthemum cinereum f. stipulatum, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum cinereum f. stipulatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
